articles.title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
articles.desc: The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.
articles.titleZh: 當局認為，川普和官員「很可能」是新聞晚宴槍擊案嫌犯的目標
articles.descZh: 官員表示，嫌犯預計將被控襲擊聯邦官員和在暴力犯罪過程中使用槍支。

articles.title: Washington hotel shooting raises questions about Trump security
articles.desc: The shooting at the White House correspondents' dinner is the third time in three years Trump has been at the centre of a major security incident.
articles.titleZh: 華盛頓飯店槍擊案引發對川普安全的質疑
articles.descZh: 白宮記者晚宴上發生的槍擊事件，是川普三年來第三次成為重大安全事件的中心。

articles.title: In pictures: Chaos as gunfire heard in Washington DC ballroom
articles.desc: Armed Secret Service agents flood the ballroom of a Washington DC hotel as President Trump is rushed off stage.
articles.titleZh: 圖片：華盛頓DC舞廳傳出槍聲，一片混亂
articles.descZh: 全副武裝的特勤局人員湧入華盛頓特區一家飯店的宴會廳，川普總統被趕下台。

articles.title: Video shows correspondents' dinner suspect charge checkpoint
articles.desc: Surveillance video released by Donald Trump shows the suspect running past metal detectors as security agents draw their guns.
articles.titleZh: 視訊顯示記者晚宴嫌犯衝過檢查站
articles.descZh: Donald Trump 發佈的監控錄影帶顯示，嫌犯在安全人員拔出槍械時，衝過金屬探測器。

articles.title: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
articles.desc: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.
articles.titleZh: 我和川普一起在房間裡，聽到低沉的槍聲
articles.descZh: BBC 的 Gary O'Donoghue 描述了當會場槍聲響起時，他和其他人跳水尋找掩護的時刻。

articles.title: Moment Trump rushed from White House Correspondents' Dinner after  gunshots heard
articles.desc: The US president was midway through a conversation before loud bangs rang out at the venue and he was quickly escorted to safety.
articles.titleZh: 特朗普在聽到槍聲後匆忙離開白宮記者晚宴的時刻
articles.descZh: 美國總統的談話進行到一半時，會場內突然響起巨響，他被迅速護送到安全的地方。

articles.title: Trump said RFK Jr could run 'wild' with health policy. Instead he's reined him in
